prompt: Optimize this MySQL aggregation query that's running a full table scan on 6 million lineitem rows...
assertions: When the database is unreachable, output explicitly stops at a hard gate rather than producing a best-effort guess
Output reports which hard gate was hit and gives the user a clear path to fix it
When the database IS reachable, the optimized SQL removes redundant DATE() wrapping
Output includes a context coverage report showing which sources (schema, stats, indexes, joins) were available
Output does not attempt an index recommendation when --no-index flag is set
